criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar renders a fixed bottom strip of exactly h-12 (48px) containing a Checkbox element wired to uiState.showStatusColors; toggling it dispatches TOGGLE_STATUS_COLORS
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:79 has className='fixed bottom-0 ... h-12'. Line 83 contains Checkbox with checked={uiState.showStatusColors} and onCheckedChange={() => uiDispatch({ type: 'TOGGLE_STATUS_COLORS' })}.

criteria_results.description: The fixed 50vh constant is removed from MobileBottomBar.tsx — no h-[50vh] class remains
criteria_results.evidence: Grep for 'h-\[50vh\]' in MobileBottomBar.tsx returned no matches. File now uses max-h-[38vh] (Line 126) and h-[55vh] (Line 134).

criteria_results.description: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx exists and exports a React component accepting an onClose prop; it contains a Select element listing docState.layers and at minimum 7 icon type buttons (camera, square, circle, triangle, star, hexagon, arrow-right)
criteria_results.evidence: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx exists. onClose prop is on Line 24. Select listing layers is on Lines 47-58. Icon buttons for camera (L65), square (L68), circle (L71), triangle (L74), star (L77), hexagon (L80), and arrow-right (L83) are present.

criteria_results.description: When an object is selected (uiState.selectedObjectIds.length > 0), MobileBottomBar renders an Input whose value is selectedObject.name and whose onChange dispatches UPDATE_OBJECTS
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:95 renders an Input when selectedObject exists. onChange calls handleNameChange (L96), which dispatches UPDATE_OBJECTS (L50).

criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar uses two Sheet components (not a mode state machine with 'list'/'edit'/'details' string literals)
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx uses two <Sheet> components (L125 and L133) controlled by addSheetOpen and editSheetOpen states. No string literals 'list', 'edit', or 'details' are used for UI modes.

criteria_results.description: The edit Sheet contains an ObjectPhotoGallery component, enabling photo addition on mobile
criteria_results.evidence: MobileBottomBar.tsx:185 renders ObjectPhotoGallery within the second Sheet (editSheetOpen).

criteria_results.description: home.tsx mobile layout wrapper div has className including 'pb-12' when isMobile is true
criteria_results.evidence: home.tsx:29 contains <div className='flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden bg-background relative pb-12'> within the isMobile branch.

criteria_results.description: MobileAddObjectPanel dispatches SET_ACTIVE_LAYER when layer is changed in the Select, before adding any object
criteria_results.evidence: MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx:47 Select onValueChange calls handleLayerChange (L40), which dispatches SET_ACTIVE_LAYER. This updates the active layer before any icon buttons (which trigger object creation) are clicked.

blocking_issues: MobileBottomBar.tsx:174 uses 'handleStatusChange(status.value)' but the function 'handleStatusChange' is not defined in the component. This will cause a ReferenceError and crash the application when a user attempts to change an object's status on mobile.
suggestions: In MobileBottomBar.tsx, implement handleStatusChange similarly to handleNameChange, dispatching UPDATE_OBJECTS with the new status value.
next_focus: Define the handleStatusChange function in MobileBottomBar.tsx to allow users to update object status without crashing the app.
